name: Alone
text:
You may flip to alter-ego form. Choose :
Exhaust Tony Stark → remove Alone from the game.
Spend 3 resources of any type. If you cannot, this card gains surge. Discard this obligation.

name: Massive Attack
text: Ha... I see... You have your own army." -Tony entrave 2[per_hero]. When Revealed : deal 1 damage to the Tony Stark Player. [amplify] [star]Boost : Put Massive Attack into play.

name: Tony Stark A.I.
text: Armored 2. Garde. Patrouille. When Revealed : deal 1 damage to the Tony Stark player. [star] Interruption forcée : When Tony Stark A.I. activates, deal 1 damage to the Tony Stark player.

name: Get My Body Back
text: Une fois révélée : deal 1 damage to the Tony Stark player, then take 1 damage.
